data.body:
## Description

Create `tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh` with 8+ test functions verifying the explore agent prompt template at `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md`.

Tests:
1. `test_template_file_exists` — template exists at expected path
2. `test_template_requires_numbered_list` — contains numbered/enumerated list output requirement
3. `test_template_requires_categorization` — contains per-file categorization instruction (primary/secondary/tangential)
4. `test_template_requires_completeness_check` — contains completeness self-check section
5. `test_template_requires_term_matching` — contains instruction to match ALL terms from request
6. `test_template_is_tech_stack_agnostic` — does NOT contain DSO-specific paths (.tickets/, plugins/dso/, app/src/) — negative constraint
7. `test_template_has_request_placeholder` — contains `{exploration_request}` placeholder
8. `test_template_has_output_example` — contains structured output format example

TDD: RED — template file doesn't exist yet. Tests are structural content tests justified under metadata/schema validation: prompt templates define normative agent instruction vocabulary.

### .test-index entry
`plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md: tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh [test_template_file_exists]`

### File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh`
- Edit: `.test-index`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh
- [ ] Valid bash
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'explore-structured-output.md.*test-explore-dispatch-template.sh.*\[test_template_file_exists\]' .test-index
